subcodes.first_line: O thou sincere and loyal handmaid of the Lord! I have read thy letter. Thou art truly attached to the Kingdom
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز صادق الهی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید فی الحقیقه تعلق بملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @study; deepening, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
